sentences.english: My worst roommate ever used to eat my food without asking.
sentences.korean: 최악의 룸메이트는 물어보지도 않고 내 음식을 먹곤 했어요.

sentences.english: I would buy groceries and they'd be gone the next day.
sentences.korean: 장을 보면 다음 날 다 없어져 있었어요.

sentences.english: My current roommate and I get along perfectly, because we have similar schedules and respect each other's space.
sentences.korean: 현재 룸메이트와 완벽하게 잘 지내요. 비슷한 일정이 있고 서로의 공간을 존중해서요.

sentences.english: The key to good roommate relationships is communication, because you have to talk about problems before they get big.
sentences.korean: 좋은 룸메이트 관계의 핵심은 소통이에요. 문제가 커지기 전에 이야기해야 하니까요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
